title: Shadows Stolen on Thriller Bark: Key Exchange
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Perona, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #1, Luffy as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Perona, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #1, focusing on the immediate stakes of shadows stolen on thriller bark: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: The Building Breaking was kinda scary though...

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: ... what... he didn't even notice us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ... that body and luffy's fighting skills...

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: Let's just give up on your shadows...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: And the bridge is also broken...

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: There's plenty of material around here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Well, we're really grateful!! Let's go!!

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: HORO HORO HORO, YOU'RE ALL DONE FOR!!!

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: Is the boss of the ghosts!?

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: It's the only way to get away....!!!
